calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came regularly on calendar this date, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept.206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 220, Judge Katherine Feinstein,Clerk Melinka Jones, Ann Mendoza, CSR 6812
Pete Ryan, Esq. for Plaintiff Puccini Consulting and Design
No Appearance by Defendant Fusion Furniture

Jacob Logsdon, witness for Plaintiff is affirmed and examined by Mr. Ryan, counsel for Plaintiff.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $83,090.27
Plus costs of suit
Plaintiff's to prepare a form of judgment for signature.

Judge Katherine Feinstein, Clerk Melinka Jones, Ann Mendoza, CSR 6812 (220)
